speaker: Command
message: Unit Phi here Command. Report highway access and immediate hazards at the pileup. Listening

speaker: Unit Phi
message: Command here Unit Phi. Both lanes appear obstructed by a large pileup, more than a dozen vehicles involved, with burned-out cars and ash across the roadway. Listening

speaker: Command
message: Unit Phi here Command. Confirm if any occupants, movement, or calls for help are visible or audible near the vehicles. Listening

speaker: Unit Phi
message: Command here Unit Phi. Negative visible occupants and no calls heard from this approach; damaged vehicles are limiting view through the pileup. Listening

speaker: Command
message: Unit Phi here Command. Report active fire, smoke, or heat showing from the vehicles or forest edge. Listening

speaker: Unit Phi
message: Command here Unit Phi. No active flame visible, light residual smoke only, forest edge is burned through with charred trees close to the highway. Listening

speaker: Command
message: Unit Phi here Command. Check for fuel leaks or unstable vehicles before moving closer. Listening

speaker: Unit Phi
message: Command here Unit Phi. Received, checking for leaking fuel, hot spots, and unstable vehicle positions along the accessible edge. Listening

speaker: Command
message: Unit Phi here Command. Maintain voice contact during the search and advise if the pileup extends beyond your visible area. Listening

speaker: Unit Phi
message: Command here Unit Phi. Affirmative, continuing search along the accessible edge of the pileup; full extent not confirmed from ground level. Finished
